textByHashes.9b4745fdea9f934349117f30455a47c55fb98a06: Hey! You can't go through there! That's private property!
textByHashes.1e4b719bafd53ee0e4f4ca3881cb67f4e55d1b8f: Welcome to the Shrimp and Parrot. Would you like to order, sir?
textByHashes.47fc063cbaf27a008278d1e00ad2f8474a0c7985: Hmmmm Gherkins eh? Ask Charlie the cook, round the back. He may have some 'gherkins' for you!
textByHashes.ff1a0834da37508f65a6b38758c14f618c507dd2: Welcome to the Shrimp and Parrot. Would you like to order, madam?
textByHashes.a09f08d322cdbf4d2e18ef88416e7bfe81a0acf5: We buy directly off Lubufu, a local fisherman. He seems to have a monopoly over Karambwan sale.
textByHashes.fc9c456c7c85f4c8556f338a6eda29b14dbc90c5: He is usually working just to the south of the town.
textByHashes.7f79f0e7fe948c571ca6335077d66cf0802f9319: Simple - nobody else knows how to catch Karambwan. It is a closely guarded secret.
